title: junglegyaan.com – Jungle Gyaan Academy – Explore. Learn. Conserve. Jungle Gyaan Academy is a wildlife learning platform based near Nagpur, dedicated to training nature lovers, students, and aspiring naturalists through immersive and practical wildlife courses. Located close to some of the finest Central India parks, we offer expert-led programs focused on Indian mammals, birds, safari observation, animal tracking, and conservation tools. Whether you're a student of zoology, a budding wildlife photographer, or simply a nature enthusiast, our field-based wildlife training courses are designed to build real skills. Learn how to identify animal signs, track birds, use binoculars and camera traps, and understand jungle behavior — all guided by professionals with deep field experience. At Jungle Gyaan Academy, we believe in learning by doing. Our courses are short, practical, and affordable — with options ranging from weekend workshops to month-long certificate programs. Join us and step into the wild with purpose.
